# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access
spec:
  workloadLabels:
    istio: ingressgateway
  filters:
  - listenerMatch:
      portNumber: 15000
      listenerType: SIDECAR_INBOUND
  filterName: envoy.filters.network.ip_allow_deny
  filterType: NETWORK
  filterConfig:
    statPrefix: admin_access
    accessDeniedStatusCode: 403
    rules:
    - action: ALLOW
      sourceRange:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-endpoints
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      listener:
        portNumber: 15000
        filterChain:
          filter:
            name: envoy.http_connection_manager
            subFilter:
              name: envoy.router
    patch:
      operation: INSERT_BEFORE
      value:
        name: envoy.filters.http.admin
        config:
          stat_prefix: admin
          access_log_path: /dev/stdout
          address:
            socket_address:
              address: 0.0.0.0
              port_value: 15000
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.admin.v3.Admin
          config_encoders:
            - name: envoy.admin.v2.config.TextReadout  
          config_state:
            lifecycle_state: LIVE
            version_info: "1"
        ignore_idle_http_sessions: true
